For use on all orchids Can be used on all orchids, indoor or out, giving you healthier and happier plants. Pet and child friendly Suitable for use as directed in areas where children and pets have access. Next page 1 Ready To Use 2 For All Orchids 3 Pet & Child Friendly For longer lasting orchids Just a few mists of Miracle-Gro Spray & Spritz Hydration Mist For Orchids will lock in the moisture for longer lasting flowers. Easy application straight to the orchid. Use with Miracle-Gro Pump & Feed Orchid Plant Food or Miracle-Gro Drip & Feed Orchid Plant Food. Spray - Enjoy! Why should I use Miracle-Gro Spray & Spritz Hydration Mist For Orchids? No mixing, no measuring, no mess. Just a few mists of Miracle-Gro Spray & Spritz Hydration Mist For Orchids will lock in the moisture for longer lasting flowers. Where can I use Miracle-Gro Spray & Spritz Hydration Mist For Orchids? Can be used on all orchids. We also recommend using Miracle-Gro Drip & Feed Food For Orchids or Miracle-Gro Pump & Feed Food For Orchids to feed your orchids the nutrients they need to thrive. When should I use Miracle-Gro Spray & Spritz Hydration Mist For Orchids? Spritz weekly to lock in the moisture for longer lasting flowers. How do I use Miracle-Gro Spray & Spritz Hydration Mist For Orchids? Spray around the roots and leaves of your orchid taking care to avoid the flowers. Keep out of reach of children.
